% Auto-generated macros for thesis (Spanish)
% Valores numéricos y resúmenes extraídos de resultados/
\newcommand{\ResPhase}{B1--B4}
\newcommand{\ResNMethods}{22}
\newcommand{\ResNInstantMethods}{14}
\newcommand{\ResNTVMethods}{8}
\newcommand{\ResNScenarios}{5}
\newcommand{\ResMissingLevels}{4}

\newcommand{\ResBaselineMAEFull}{0.071270}
\newcommand{\ResBaselineRMSEFull}{0.162150}
\newcommand{\ResTVDTWFull}{0.491819}

% p-values
\newcommand{\StatFamilyMAEpval}{4.769630703710377e-44}
\newcommand{\StatFamilyDTWpval}{2.403495923470857e-12}
\newcommand{\StatTRSSBGSRPpval}{6.111368891088274e-259}
\newcommand{\StatTRSSGSPpval}{0.9809566220799211}

\newcommand{\StatFamilyResultES}{TV/Tiempo superó a Instant (MAE $p=\StatFamilyMAEpval$, DTW $p=\StatFamilyDTWpval$)}
\newcommand{\StatTRSSGSRPResultES}{TRSS superó a BGSRP (MAE $p=\StatTRSSBGSRPpval$)}
\newcommand{\StatTRSSGSPResultES}{Sin diferencia significativa (MAE $p=\StatTRSSGSPpval$)}

% it100 canonical metadata
\newcommand{\ItHundredGainPct}{21.81186661279092}
\newcommand{\ItHundredPval}{8.478794557394802e-15}
\newcommand{\ItHundredBestMethod}{trss}
\newcommand{\ItHundredBestMae}{0.17959423368096358}

% Compatibility aliases (paper table fragments expect these names)
\newcommand{\ResNGraphMethods}{\ResNMethods}
\newcommand{\StatFamilyResult}{\StatFamilyResultES}
\newcommand{\StatTRSSGSRPResult}{\StatTRSSGSRPResultES}
\newcommand{\StatTRSSGSPResult}{\StatTRSSGSPResultES}

% Helper to display only the filename part for long artifact paths
% Uses xstring's \IfSubStr and \StrBehind to extract text after "results/"
% Use \seqsplit to allow line breaks inside long filenames so longtable columns can wrap.
\RequirePackage{seqsplit}
% Support ragged column definitions and arraybackslash for table column formatting
\RequirePackage{array}
\newcommand{\showresfile}[1]{%
	\IfSubStr{#1}{results/}{%
		\StrBehind{#1}{results/}[\resfile]%
		\begingroup\ttfamily\edef\srfname{\detokenize{\resfile}}\seqsplit{\srfname}\endgroup%
	}{%
		\begingroup\ttfamily\edef\srfname{\detokenize{#1}}\seqsplit{\srfname}\endgroup%
	}%
}

% Helper to display tags (allows underscores to break)
\newcommand{\showtag}[1]{%
	\StrSubstitute{#1}{\_}{_}[\tmp]% replace escaped underscores
	\begingroup\ttfamily\edef\tgname{\detokenize{\tmp}}\seqsplit{\tgname}\endgroup%
}

% Make escaped underscores breakable by inserting a break point before the printed underscore
\DeclareRobustCommand{\_}{\allowbreak\textunderscore}

% Make \texttt safe and breakable by default: route to \showtag which
% uses \ttfamily + \seqsplit for safe line-breaking of long identifiers.
\let\oldtexttt\texttt
\renewcommand{\texttt}[1]{\showtag{#1}}
